shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && git status --short && printf '\\n--- top ---\\n' && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g 'package.json' -g 'src/**' -g '*test*' | head -80"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "react-datepicker selectsRange multi-month filler day in-selecting-range highlight day rendering" --json --top-k 5'
/bin/bash -lc 'rg -n "selecting|in-selecting|monthDate|outside|isSameMonth|month" src/day.tsx src/month.tsx src/calendar.tsx src/test/day_test.test.tsx src/test/multi_month_test.test.tsx | head -240'
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,280p' src/day.tsx && sed -n '1,260p' src/month.tsx && sed -n '540,710p' src/test/day_test.test.tsx && sed -n '1480,1565p' src/test/day_test.test.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '240,560p' src/day.tsx; rg -n \"<Day|month=|renderDays|week\" src/month.tsx | tail -80; sed -n '330,570p' src/month.tsx; sed -n '1,80p' src/test/day_test.test.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,180p' src/test/test_utils.ts; rg -n \"jest.useFakeTimers|setSystemTime|newDate\\(\" src/test/setup* src/test/index.ts package.json jest.config* 2>/dev/null | head -100; sed -n '560,680p' src/month.tsx; sed -n '1,260p' src/week.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc "cat package.json | sed -n '1,180p'; rg -n \"newDate|Date.now|setSystemTime|TZ|setupFiles\" . -g '*.ts' -g '*.tsx' -g '*.js' -g '*.json' | head -120; sed -n '1010,1070p' src/calendar.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc "cat src/test/index.ts; git log -5 --oneline -- src/day.tsx; rg -n \"renderDay\\(["'^'"\\n]*\\{[\\s\\S]{0,100}month\" src/test/day_test.test.tsx | head"
/bin/bash -lc "git log --all -S'outside-month' --oneline -- src/day.tsx | head -20; git branch -a --no-color | head -30; git remote -v"
/bin/bash -lc 'yarn type-check; git diff -- src/day.tsx src/test/day_test.test.tsx; git status --short'
